svg.text: Writing clean and testable Java code
Focused on building reliable, scalable and maintainable backend systems.
Currently working at Lyreco Group while completing my Engineering Degree at SUPINFO.
I enjoy designing systems around Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, clean architecture, testing and observability.

g.text: Distributed ticketing platform inspired by Ticketmaster and Eventbrite.
Enterprise-oriented platform for data ingestion, validation and analytics.
Batch processing · CSV/JSON ingestion · Data validation · Reporting

Client-server · Custom protocol · Fixed tick game loop · Real-time multiplayer
